initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    s.LastName,
    CASE 
        WHEN quintile <= 0.2 THEN 'First'
        WHEN quintile <= 0.4 THEN 'Second'
        WHEN quintile <= 0.6 THEN 'Third'
        WHEN quintile <= 0.8 THEN 'Fourth'
        ELSE 'Fifth'
    END AS Quintile
FROM Students s
JOIN Enrollments e ON s.StudentID = e.StudentID
JOIN Courses c ON e.CourseID = c.CourseID
WHERE c.CourseName = 'English' 
  AND e.ClassStatus = 2
  AND e.Grade IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY e.Grade DESC;

WITH CompletedEnglishStudents AS (
    SELECT 
        StudentID,
        Grade,
        ClassStatus
    FROM 
        Students s
    JOIN 
        Enrollments e ON s.StudentID = e.StudentID
    JOIN 
        Courses c ON e.CourseID = c.CourseID
    WHERE 
        c.CourseName = 'English' 
        AND e.ClassStatus = 2
),
QuintileCalc AS (
    SELECT 
        s.LastName,
        ces.Grade,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) 
         FROM CompletedEnglishStudents ces2 
         WHERE ces2.Grade >= ces.Grade) * 1.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CompletedEnglishStudents) AS RankRatio
    FROM 
        CompletedEnglishStudents ces
    JOIN 
        Students s ON ces.StudentID = s.StudentID
)
SELECT 
    LastName,
    CASE 
        WHEN RankRatio <= 0.2 THEN 'First'
        WHEN RankRatio <= 0.4 THEN 'Second'
        WHEN RankRatio <= 0.6 THEN 'Third'
        WHEN RankRatio <= 0.8 THEN 'Fourth'
        ELSE 'Fifth'
    END AS Quintile
FROM 
    QuintileCalc
ORDER BY 
    RankRatio ASC;
